title: System Dynamics Basics
content: Introduces stock-and-flow diagrams, reinforcing loops, and balancing loops for systems modeling.

title: Monte Carlo Risk Analysis
content: Uses random sampling to estimate risk ranges and confidence intervals for engineering decisions.

title: Requirements Traceability
content: Shows how to map stakeholder requirements to design artifacts and test evidence.

title: Digital Twin Deployment
content: Describes architecture patterns for streaming telemetry into a digital twin for health monitoring.

title: Bayesian Updating for Forecasts
content: Explains how prior beliefs are updated with observed data to improve forecast quality.

title: Human-in-the-Loop AI
content: Covers review workflows where analysts validate model outputs before operational use.

title: Design of Experiments
content: Summarizes factorial designs and response surface methods for process improvement.

title: Fault Tree Analysis
content: Demonstrates top-down safety analysis to identify combinations of failures leading to hazards.

title: Queueing for Service Systems
content: Explains M/M/1 intuition for balancing service rates and expected waiting times.

title: Prompt Evaluation Rubric
content: Provides a scoring rubric for clarity, grounding, and actionability of AI-generated reports.
